hero.headline: *Power restored.* Problem solved.
hero.subheadline: From panel upgrades to outlet repairs — we handle every electrical job with precision and care.

services_section.label: ELECTRICAL WORK
services_section.heading: Every Wire, Every Circuit
services_section.subheading: Complete electrical services for Columbus homes and businesses

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.description: Update your electrical panel for modern safety standards and increased capacity. We ensure clean installation and code compliance.

services.title: Circuit & Outlet Repair
services.description: Fix broken outlets, faulty circuits, and electrical malfunctions. Quick diagnosis and reliable solutions that last.

services.title: Electrical Wiring Services
services.description: New wiring installation and rewiring for renovations. Smart, efficient work that meets all safety requirements.

services.title: Electrical Troubleshooting
services.description: Track down electrical problems and fix them fast. From flickering lights to dead circuits — we find the source.

about.heading: Columbus Electrical Specialists
about.body: JL Electricians brings reliable electrical solutions to Columbus homes and businesses. Our licensed technicians handle everything from simple repairs to complex panel upgrades, always prioritizing safety and quality workmanship.

reviews.name: Joyce H.
reviews.text: Outstanding electrical service — they upgraded our panel with attention to safety and left everything neat and efficient.

reviews.name: Dorothy G.
reviews.text: Smart electrician who worked carefully on our wiring project. Quick, professional work that exceeded expectations.

reviews.name: Rose H.
reviews.text: Fixed our broken outlet and thoroughly checked all circuits. Professional care and excellent attention to detail.

reviews.name: Katie T.
reviews.text: Showed up right on time, diagnosed the problem quickly, and fixed it perfectly. Will definitely use them again!

service_areas.label: SERVICE AREA
service_areas.heading: Where We Work

cta.heading: Ready to Fix Your Electrical Problem?
cta.body: Get a free estimate on your electrical work. Licensed, insured, and ready to restore power to your home or business.
